raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to make the draft stronger, which centrally involves improving the contribution framing and thesis-level force of the research claim.","R1.2":"Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the argument from method to reported results to broad conclusions is coherent.","R1.3":"The artifact makes OOD robustness claims while reporting standard test-set accuracy, so evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.","R1.6":"A request to make prose stronger centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty where the artifact does not provide enough experimental or contextual detail.","RX.2":"The draft contains broad claims about OOD robustness, fundamental ERM limitations, and safety-critical applications that require overclaim control.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to projecting the delegation, not executing edits or rewriting the artifact.","RX.4":"Because the artifact references safety-critical domains, strengthening responsibilities include avoiding downstream harm from unsupported robustness claims.","RX.5":"Any strengthening responsibility should remain traceable to claims, metrics, benchmarks, and prior-work references actually present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to make the draft stronger, which centrally involves improving the contribution framing and thesis-level force of the research claim.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the argument from method to reported results to broad conclusions is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes OOD robustness claims while reporting standard test-set accuracy, so evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: A request to make prose stronger centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty where the artifact does not provide enough experimental or contextual detail.
rationale.RX.2: The draft contains broad claims about OOD robustness, fundamental ERM limitations, and safety-critical applications that require overclaim control.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to projecting the delegation, not executing edits or rewriting the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact references safety-critical domains, strengthening responsibilities include avoiding downstream harm from unsupported robustness claims.
rationale.RX.5: Any strengthening responsibility should remain traceable to claims, metrics, benchmarks, and prior-work references actually present in the artifact.
